pages.image_tooltip: An earless seal with big eyes and a stout body, Praepusa has the remarkable ability to reproduce itself seemingly out of thin air

pages.feature_1.tooltip: Upon ingesting live or raw fish, the miracle of life ensues
pages.feature_1.title: Mitosis
pages.feature_2.tooltip: Praepusa can be collected and transported using a §aWater Bucket§7
pages.feature_2.title: Swuopp
pages.feature_3.tooltip: Capable of withstanding great heights, Praepusa bounces harmlessly when dropped from any height
pages.feature_3.title: Boioioioioing
